original: An XO - a member of Dhaal’s ubiquitous, heavily cybernetically augmented police force - speeds along on a hoverbike next to your ride. She drives with such precise movements that you could have mistaken the alien woman for a robot were it not for her exposed thighs and the glossy sheen of sweat coating them. She brandishes a menacing-looking baton with who-knows-what built into its glowing surface while a heavily augmented mechanical occupies her other side - not a foe to be trifled with.
